infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MiPropertyGuru uses your location to find contractors near you.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: MiPropertyGuru uses your location in the background so clients can find you while you work.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: MiPropertyGuru uses your location in the background so clients can find you while you work.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MiPropertyGuru needs camera access to let you take photos of your completed work.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MiPropertyGuru needs photo library access to let you upload portfolio images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: MiPropertyGuru needs permission to save photos to your library.
